summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new Composer Bar and Post System overhaul. All features working correctly. Backend: 22/22 tests passed. Frontend: All composer modals, feed cards, and interactions verified.
passed_tests: BACKEND: POST /api/composer/now-spinning creates NOW_SPINNING post + logs spin - PASSED
BACKEND: POST /api/composer/now-spinning requires record_id (422 on missing) - PASSED
BACKEND: POST /api/composer/now-spinning returns 404 for invalid record_id - PASSED
BACKEND: POST /api/composer/new-haul creates NEW_HAUL post + adds records to collection - PASSED
BACKEND: POST /api/composer/new-haul allows empty items (frontend validates) - PASSED
BACKEND: POST /api/composer/iso creates ISO post + iso_item with OPEN status - PASSED
BACKEND: POST /api/composer/iso requires artist and album (422 on missing) - PASSED
BACKEND: POST /api/composer/vinyl-mood creates VINYL_MOOD post with mood preset - PASSED
BACKEND: POST /api/composer/vinyl-mood works without record_id - PASSED
BACKEND: POST /api/composer/vinyl-mood requires mood (422 on missing) - PASSED
BACKEND: GET /api/feed returns posts with normalized post_type enum values - PASSED
BACKEND: GET /api/feed includes record data for NOW_SPINNING posts - PASSED
BACKEND: GET /api/feed includes haul data for NEW_HAUL posts - PASSED
BACKEND: GET /api/feed includes iso data for ISO posts - PASSED
BACKEND: GET /api/iso returns user's ISO items with status - PASSED
BACKEND: PUT /api/iso/{id}/found marks ISO as FOUND with found_at timestamp - PASSED
BACKEND: PUT /api/iso/{id}/found returns 404 for nonexistent ISO - PASSED
BACKEND: POST /api/posts/{id}/like works - PASSED
BACKEND: DELETE /api/posts/{id}/like works - PASSED
BACKEND: POST /api/posts/{id}/comments works - PASSED
BACKEND: GET /api/posts/{id}/comments works - PASSED
BACKEND: GET /api/discogs/search returns results for haul workflow - PASSED
FRONTEND: Composer bar visible at top of /hive with 4 chips - PASSED
FRONTEND: Now Spinning chip opens modal with record selector, track input, caption, submit - PASSED
FRONTEND: New Haul chip opens modal with Discogs search, adds items to list - PASSED
FRONTEND: ISO chip opens modal with artist/album fields, pressing notes, budget range - PASSED
FRONTEND: Vinyl Mood chip opens modal with 12 mood preset grid (3x4), record selector - PASSED
FRONTEND: Feed renders NOW_SPINNING cards with album art + track info - PASSED
FRONTEND: Feed renders ISO cards with blue bg, status badge (OPEN/FOUND), pressing notes, budget - PASSED
FRONTEND: Feed renders VINYL_MOOD cards with mood preset pill + linked record - PASSED
FRONTEND: Feed renders NEW_HAUL cards with store name + record grid - PASSED
FRONTEND: Feed renders WEEKLY_WRAP cards correctly - PASSED
FRONTEND: Feed renders ADDED_TO_COLLECTION cards correctly - PASSED
FRONTEND: Likes toggle correctly on all post types - PASSED
FRONTEND: Comments expand/collapse and submission works on all post types - PASSED
FRONTEND: Collection page sorting works with all 10 options - PASSED
seed_data_creation: Test data created during pytest: NOW_SPINNING posts, NEW_HAUL posts with test records, ISO items (OPEN and FOUND status), VINYL_MOOD posts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Composer Bar feature fully tested and working. All 4 composer chips (Now Spinning, New Haul, ISO, Vinyl Mood) open modals with proper forms. Post types are correctly normalized via POST_TYPE_MAP in backend (legacy 'spin' -> 'NOW_SPINNING', etc.). Feed displays all 6 post types with specialized card layouts. Demo user has 145 records in collection (143 imported from Discogs + 2 test records from haul). All 10 sort options working on Collection page. Likes/comments work on all post types.
